inputs.label: Footing Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of a single footing in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of a single footing in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir temelin metre cinsinden uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Footing Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of a single footing in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of a single footing in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir temelin metre cinsinden genişliği.

inputs.label: Footing Depth
inputs.businessContext: The depth or thickness of the footing in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The depth or thickness of the footing in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel derinliği veya kalınlığı metre cinsinden.

inputs.label: Number of Footings
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical footings to be poured.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of identical footings to be poured.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra concrete added to account for spillage, over‑excavation, and formwork irregularities.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of extra concrete added to account for spillage, over‑excavation, and formwork irregularities.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dökülme, aşırı kazı ve kalıp düzensizliklerini karşılamak için eklenen ekstra beton yüzdesi.
